ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cruises" (
  "cruise_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cruise */,
  "cruise_name" TEXT /* Name of the cruise */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the cruise */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the cruise */,
  "cruise_leader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lead researcher for the cruise */,
  "vessel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vessel used for the cruise */,
  "cruise_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the cruise */,
  "total_stations" INTEGER /* Total number of stations visited during the cruise */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the cruise */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the cruise */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cruise_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cruises_cruise_leader_id FOREIGN KEY ("cruise_leader_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the station */,
  "depth" REAL /* Depth of the station in meters */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the station */,
  "environment_conditions" TEXT /* Environmental conditions at the station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "cruise_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cruise the experiment belongs to */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station where the experiment was conducted */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "experiment_date" TEXT /* Date the experiment was conducted */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lead researcher for the experiment */,
  "equipment_list" TEXT /* List of equipment used in the experiment */,
  "experiment_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the experiment */,
  "results_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the experiment results */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_cruise_id FOREIGN KEY ("cruise_id") REFERENCES cruises ("cruise_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each species */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the species was caught during */,
  "species_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the species */,
  "common_name" TEXT /* Common name of the species */,
  "length" REAL /* Length of the species */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the species */,
  "species_count" INTEGER /* Number of individuals of the species caught */,
  "habitat" TEXT /* Habitat where the species was found */,
  "diet" TEXT /* Diet of the species */,
  "conservation_status" TEXT /* Conservation status of the species */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_species_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each equipment */,
  "equipment_name" TEXT /* Name of the equipment */,
  "equipment_type" TEXT /* Type of the equipment */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the equipment */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the equipment */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date when the equipment was purchased */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the last calibration */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the equipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_equipment" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment used during the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id", "equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Name of the researcher */,
  "researcher_email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or institution the researcher is associated with */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the researcher */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the researcher */,
  "joined_date" TEXT /* Date the researcher joined the institution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_researchers" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher involved in the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id", "researcher_id")
)
